payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet door showing a recessed rectangular panel with thin molded inner trim; the crop shows the lower portion of the door, edge-cropped on the left, with visible wood grain, a matte finish and slight scuffing along the bottom edge — approximately 0.5 m from the camera.
